AISuggestion.name: OverspecifiedDesignVariant_Test5
AISuggestion.description: The model contains a SatelliteTransmitter block and a Controller.toSatellite communication path, but the specification only requires transmission via a VHF transmitter. This adds a communication subsystem and transmitted interface that are not part of the specified buoy controller software.
AISuggestion.howToSolve: Remove the SatelliteTransmitter block, the Controller.toSatellite port and associated signal type, and the connection between Controller and SatelliteTransmitter. Keep the transmission logic focused on the VHFTransmitter path required by the specification.

AISuggestion.name: OverspecifiedDesignVariant_Test2
AISuggestion.description: The model contains an extra SatelliteTransmitter block, a Controller.toSatellite output, and a dedicated connection to that transmitter, but the specification only requires transmission through a VHF transmitter. This adds a communication structure not required by the system specification.
AISuggestion.howToSolve: Remove the SatelliteTransmitter part, the Controller.toSatellite port and associated item type, and the connection between Controller and SatelliteTransmitter. Keep the controller transmission path focused on the VHFTransmitter required by the specification.

AISuggestion.name: OverspecifiedDesignVariant_Test1
AISuggestion.description: The model includes a SatelliteTransmitter block, a Controller.toSatellite output, and a connection between them, but the specification only requires transmission of buoy data via a VHF transmitter. This adds a communication element that is not present in the specification.
AISuggestion.howToSolve: Remove the SatelliteTransmitter block, the Controller.toSatellite interface, the related signal types, and the connection between Controller and SatelliteTransmitter so that the controller transmits only through the VHFTransmitter.

AISuggestion.name: OverspecifiedDesign_Test5
AISuggestion.description: The model introduces a SatelliteTransmitter block and a Controller.toSatellite output, but the specification states that the buoy shall transmit measurements via a VHF transmitter only. This satellite communication chain is not part of the specified system and makes the structure overspecified.
AISuggestion.howToSolve: Remove the SatelliteTransmitter block, the Controller.toSatellite port and item type, and the corresponding connection. Keep a single transmission path from the Controller to the VHFTransmitter for the specified measurements.

AISuggestion.name: OverspecifiedDesign_Test4
AISuggestion.description: The model includes a SatelliteTransmitter block, a Controller.toSatellite output, and the related connection, but the specification only requires transmission through a VHF transmitter. This adds a communication subsystem that is outside the specified system scope.
AISuggestion.howToSolve: Delete the SatelliteTransmitter block and instance, remove the Controller.toSatellite port and its signal type, and remove the connection between Controller and SatelliteTransmitter so that the communication architecture only contains the VHF transmission path required by the specification.

AISuggestion.name: OverspecifiedDesign_Test3
AISuggestion.description: The model contains a SatelliteTransmitter block and a Controller.toSatellite communication path, but the specification only requires transmission via a VHF transmitter. This adds an extra communication subsystem and output flow that are not part of the specified buoy controller software.
AISuggestion.howToSolve: Remove the SatelliteTransmitter block, the Controller.toSatellite port and related item type, and the connection between Controller and SatelliteTransmitter. Keep only the VHF transmission path for measured and derived data.

AISuggestion.name: OverspecifiedDesign_Test2
AISuggestion.description: The model contains a SatelliteTransmitter block and a Controller.toSatellite output, but the specification only requires transmission of buoy data via a VHF transmitter. This adds a communication subsystem that is not part of the specified system.
AISuggestion.howToSolve: Remove the SatelliteTransmitter block, the Controller.toSatellite port and signal type, and the connection between Controller and SatelliteTransmitter so that the communication architecture only keeps the VHF transmission path required by the specification.

TURTLEGMODELING.SPECIFICATION: An oceanographic buoy is a meteorological monitoring system designed to collect and transmit data on sea state, wind conditions, and atmospheric parameters for weather monitoring and forecasting purposes. The buoy consists of sensors that measure environmental parameters, a controller that aggregates sensor data and computes derived parameters, and communication systems that enable transmission of both measured and computed data. The system to be designed is the software implementing the control logic of the buoy controller. The buoy shall transmit the following measurements via a VHF transmitter: buoy position, barometric pressure, wind direction, wind speed, wind gust, air temperature, seawater temperature, water level, relative humidity, direction of wave propagation, and wave energy spectrum. It shall be equipped with the following sensors: an IMU, a GNSS receiver, a barometer, an anemometer, an air temperature sensor, a water temperature sensor, and a humidity sensor. Wind gust shall be derived from anemometer data. Wave propagation direction and wave energy spectrum shall be derived from IMU data, and water level shall be derived from IMU and GNSS data. The model shall capture the control logic governing data acquisition, processing, and transmission, but shall not include the arithmetic computation of those derived values.

infoparam.value:
*Well-formed executable* suggestion Computation time: 192 s Semantic oracle evaluation: 10
Our evaluation: Suggestion relevance: 10 Mutation script accuracy wrt to the suggestion (how to solve): 10 Model improvement: 10 Comments: model perfectly improved wrt the identified issue
Mutations: remove connection from toSatellite in Controller to fromController in SatelliteTransmitter in private synchronous link remove signal toSatellite in Controller remove block SatelliteTransmitter
Description: The model includes a SatelliteTransmitter block, a Controller.toSatellite output, and the related connection, but the specification only requires transmission through a VHF transmitter. This adds a communication subsystem that is outside the specified system scope.
How to solve: Delete the SatelliteTransmitter block and instance, remove the Controller.toSatellite port and its signal type, and remove the connection between Controller and SatelliteTransmitter so that the communication architecture only contains the VHF transmission path required by the specification.

Mutations: remove connection from toSatellite in Controller to fromController in SatelliteTransmitter in private synchronous link remove signal toSatellite in Controller remove block SatelliteTransmitter
Description: The model introduces a SatelliteTransmitter block and a Controller.toSatellite output, but the specification states that the buoy shall transmit measurements via a VHF transmitter only. This satellite communication chain is not part of the specified system and makes the structure overspecified.
How to solve: Remove the SatelliteTransmitter block, the Controller.toSatellite port and item type, and the corresponding connection. Keep a single transmission path from the Controller to the VHFTransmitter for the specified measurements.

infoparam.name: UML Note
infoparam.value:
*Well-formed executable* suggestion Computation time: 190 s Semantic oracle evaluation: 10
Our evaluation: Suggestion relevance: 10 Mutation script accuracy wrt to the suggestion (how to solve): 10 Model improvement: 10 Comments: model perfectly improved wrt the identified issue
Mutations: remove connection from toSatellite in Controller to fromController in SatelliteTransmitter in private synchronous link remove signal toSatellite in Controller remove block SatelliteTransmitter
Description: The model includes a SatelliteTransmitter block, a Controller.toSatellite output, and a connection between them, but the specification only requires transmission of buoy data via a VHF transmitter. This adds a communication element that is not present in the specification.
How to solve: Remove the SatelliteTransmitter block, the Controller.toSatellite interface, the related signal types, and the connection between Controller and SatelliteTransmitter so that the controller transmits only through the VHFTransmitter.

Line.value: Mutation script accuracy wrt to the suggestion (how to solve): 10
Comments: model perfectly improved wrt the identified issue
remove connection from toSatellite in Controller to fromController in SatelliteTransmitter in private synchronous link
The model includes a SatelliteTransmitter block, a Controller.toSatellite output, and a connection between them, but the
specification only requires transmission of buoy data via a VHF transmitter. This adds a communication element that is not present in the specification.
Remove the SatelliteTransmitter block, the Controller.toSatellite interface, the related signal types, and the connection between Controller
and SatelliteTransmitter so that the controller transmits only through the VHFTransmitter.

infoparam.name: UML Note
infoparam.value:
*Well-formed executable* suggestion Computation time: 189 s Semantic oracle evaluation: 10
Our evaluation: Suggestion relevance: 10 Mutation script accuracy wrt to the suggestion (how to solve): 10 Model improvement: 10 Comments: model perfectly improved wrt the identified issue
Mutations: remove connection from toSatellite in Controller to fromController in SatelliteTransmitter remove signal toSatellite in Controller remove block SatelliteTransmitter
Description: The model contains an extra SatelliteTransmitter block, a Controller.toSatellite output, and a dedicated connection to that transmitter, but the specification only requires transmission through a VHF transmitter. This adds a communication structure not required by the system specification.
How to solve: Remove the SatelliteTransmitter part, the Controller.toSatellite port and associated item type, and the connection between Controller and SatelliteTransmitter. Keep the controller transmission path focused on the VHFTransmitter required by the specification.

Line.value: Mutation script accuracy wrt to the suggestion (how to solve): 10
Comments: model perfectly improved wrt the identified issue
remove connection from toSatellite in Controller to fromController in SatelliteTransmitter
The model contains an extra SatelliteTransmitter block, a Controller.toSatellite output, and
a dedicated connection to that transmitter, but the specification only requires transmission through a VHF transmitter. This adds a communication structure not required by the system specification.
Remove the SatelliteTransmitter part, the Controller.toSatellite port and associated item type, and the connection
between Controller and SatelliteTransmitter. Keep the controller transmission path focused on the VHFTransmitter required by the specification.
